repair_guidance: Re-read every trusted assertion before changing code. Build one ordered_nodes list from mapping keys followed by unseen neighbors in first-discovery order. Snapshot adjacency with graph.get, compute all indegrees, and always scan ordered_nodes to choose the first ready unprocessed node. Never use min, sorted, a set, or mutate graph. Compare output length with ordered_nodes to detect cycles.
prompt: Implement exactly one Python function named stable_topological_sort(graph). Return only one complete Python code block under 50 lines. Treat graph as outgoing adjacency without mutation. Preserve mapping-key order followed by unseen-neighbor discovery order. Include neighbor-only nodes via graph.get. Never use set, min, sorted, or lexical ordering. Repeatedly choose the earliest ready unprocessed node in the complete order and raise ValueError if the complete graph cannot be emitted.
